title: 5.1 Design Data Models: Task, WBS, Logic, Float
body:
**Module 5.1 - Schedule Engine Foundation**

**Scope:**
- Create Task, WBS, Logic, Float TypeScript interfaces
- Define duration calculation types
- Design critical path data structures

**Files to Create:**
- `backend/src/models/schedule-models.ts`
- `backend/src/types/schedule-types.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Task interface with ID, name, duration, start/finish dates
- [ ] WBS hierarchy structure definition
- [ ] Logic relationship types (FS, SS, FF, SF)
- [ ] Float calculation data types
- [ ] Unit tests for model validation

**Lines of Code:** ~150 LOC
**Dependencies:** Redis + BullMQ Setup complete

title: 5.2 Implement Forward Pass (ES/EF)
body:
**Module 5.2 - CPM Forward Pass Algorithm**

**Scope:**
- Implement Early Start (ES) calculation algorithm
- Implement Early Finish (EF) calculation logic
- Build dependency chain traversal system

**Files to Create:**
- `backend/src/services/cpm-forward-pass.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Forward pass algorithm implementation
- [ ] Dependency chain traversal logic
- [ ] ES/EF calculation for all task types
- [ ] Handle circular dependency detection
- [ ] Unit tests for various scenarios

**Lines of Code:** ~180 LOC
**Dependencies:** 5.1 Data Models complete

title: 5.3 Implement Backward Pass (LS/LF)
body:
**Module 5.3 - CPM Backward Pass Algorithm**

**Scope:**
- Implement Late Start (LS) calculation algorithm
- Implement Late Finish (LF) calculation logic
- Build reverse dependency traversal system

**Files to Create:**
- `backend/src/services/cpm-backward-pass.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Backward pass algorithm implementation
- [ ] Reverse dependency traversal logic
- [ ] LS/LF calculation for all task types
- [ ] Integration with forward pass results
- [ ] Unit tests for backward pass scenarios

**Lines of Code:** ~180 LOC
**Dependencies:** 5.2 Forward Pass complete

title: 5.4 Calculate Float, Critical Path Flag
body:
**Module 5.4 - Float Calculation & Critical Path**

**Scope:**
- Implement total float calculation (LS - ES)
- Implement free float calculation
- Identify critical path tasks (float = 0)

**Files to Create:**
- `backend/src/services/cpm-calculator.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Total float calculation algorithm
- [ ] Free float calculation algorithm
- [ ] Critical path identification logic
- [ ] Float-based task prioritization
- [ ] Unit tests for float and critical path scenarios

**Lines of Code:** ~120 LOC
**Dependencies:** 5.3 Backward Pass complete

title: 5.5 Build API to Accept Task List and Return Results
body:
**Module 5.5 - Schedule Engine API Endpoints**

**Scope:**
- Create REST endpoint for schedule calculation
- Implement input validation and sanitization
- Build response formatting with results

**Files to Create:**
- `backend/src/routes/schedule-api.ts`
- `backend/src/controllers/schedule-controller.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] POST /api/schedule/calculate endpoint
- [ ] Input validation for task data
- [ ] Response formatting with schedule results
- [ ] Error handling and status codes
- [ ] API integration tests

**Lines of Code:** ~160 LOC
**Dependencies:** 5.4 Float Calculation complete

title: 5.6 Unit Test All Schedule Logic (1K, 5K, 10K Tasks)
body:
**Module 5.6 - Performance Testing & Optimization**

**Scope:**
- Performance testing with large datasets (1K, 5K, 10K tasks)
- Memory usage optimization
- Algorithm efficiency validation

**Files to Create:**
- `backend/src/tests/schedule-performance.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Performance tests for 1,000 tasks
- [ ] Performance tests for 5,000 tasks
- [ ] Performance tests for 10,000 tasks
- [ ] Memory usage profiling
- [ ] Performance benchmarks and optimization

**Lines of Code:** ~200 LOC
**Dependencies:** 5.5 API Endpoints complete

title: 6.1 Define Constraint Types (Hard, Soft, Calendar)
body:
**Module 6.1 - Constraint Type Definitions**

**Scope:**
- Define constraint interface definitions
- Create hard constraint validation rules
- Implement soft constraint warning system

**Files to Create:**
- `backend/src/types/constraint-types.ts`
- `backend/src/models/constraint-models.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Hard constraint interface (must not violate)
- [ ] Soft constraint interface (warning only)
- [ ] Calendar constraint definitions
- [ ] Constraint priority levels
- [ ] Constraint validation rules

**Lines of Code:** ~140 LOC
**Dependencies:** Module 5 Schedule Engine complete

title: 6.2 Implement Validation Engine
body:
**Module 6.2 - Constraint Validation Engine**

**Scope:**
- Build constraint checking algorithms
- Implement violation detection and reporting
- Create constraint resolution suggestions

**Files to Create:**
- `backend/src/services/constraint-validator.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Constraint validation algorithms
- [ ] Violation detection system
- [ ] Resolution suggestion engine
- [ ] Validation result reporting
- [ ] Unit tests for validation scenarios

**Lines of Code:** ~200 LOC
**Dependencies:** 6.1 Constraint Types complete

title: 6.3 Connect to Schedule Engine for Constraint-Aware Recalculations
body:
**Module 6.3 - Schedule Engine Integration**

**Scope:**
- Integrate constraint validation with CPM engine
- Implement automatic schedule adjustment
- Build constraint propagation logic

**Files to Create:**
- `backend/src/services/constraint-optimizer.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] CPM engine integration
- [ ] Automatic schedule adjustment
- [ ] Constraint propagation logic
- [ ] Optimization algorithm implementation
- [ ] Integration tests with schedule engine

**Lines of Code:** ~180 LOC
**Dependencies:** 6.2 Validation Engine complete

title: 6.4 Add UI Error Flag Feedback
body:
**Module 6.4 - Constraint Feedback UI**

**Scope:**
- Create constraint violation indicators
- Implement user-friendly error messages
- Build resolution guidance display

**Files to Create:**
- `frontend/src/components/constraint-feedback.tsx`
- `frontend/src/hooks/useConstraints.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Constraint violation visual indicators
- [ ] Error message display system
- [ ] Resolution guidance UI
- [ ] Real-time constraint status updates
- [ ] UI component tests

**Lines of Code:** ~120 LOC
**Dependencies:** 6.3 Schedule Integration complete
